# Errored Coin

> Errored Coin is a business and financial error advisory practice serving Indian MSMEs, grocery and local shop owners, startup founders, salaried investors, solopreneurs, and family businesses. It is an initiative by Aadi Projects, a Pune-based management consulting and capital advisory firm founded in 2015, and is founded and led by Komal Vijay.

Errored Coin's position: a business or financial error is a signal to be read, not a failure to be hidden. The practice helps people and businesses correctly diagnose what went wrong before attempting recovery.

Errored Coin is NOT a loan recovery agency or debt collection agency. It does not collect debts or recover loans on anyone's behalf.

## Services (in sequence)
- Health Check: an honest diagnosis of what went wrong in the business or finances
- Loss Control: immediate steps to stop what is still actively causing damage
- Recovery Roadmap: a specific, sequenced plan back to stability (typically 6-24 months)
- Guided Re-Entry: support through the return to normal operations, with guardrails

## The Six Error Types
Errored Coin's diagnostic framework names six types of business/financial error: Cash Error, Market Error, Trust Error, Timing Error, Paperwork Error, and Panic Error. Naming the correct error type is treated as the essential first step before any recovery plan is built.

## Who Errored Coin Serves
Indian MSMEs, grocery and local shop owners, startup founders, family-run businesses, salaried individual investors, and solopreneurs who have experienced a specific business or financial setback.

## Capital & Restart
Errored Coin provides advisory guidance across five capital and recovery channels to help viable businesses restart once a recovery roadmap is in place. Capital involvement is advisory, not a committed investment fund.

## Contact
One email handles everything: team@errored.co.in. No forms, no intake calls.

## Website
The entire site lives at a single URL with in-page sections: https://www.errored.co.in/
